ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label for the data source (e.g., Ministry of Health) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government report, academic study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_types" (
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing type */,
  "testing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing type (e.g., unclear, PCR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the testing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement (e.g., tests performed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "testing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing type used */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement used */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "cumulative_total" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of tests performed */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of cases */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_testing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_type_id") REFERENCES testing_types ("testing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "file_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being versioned */,
  "file_version_date" TEXT /* Date when the file version was created */,
  "file_version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this file version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the file version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)
